evidently.launch.stepconfig.GroupWeights.Docs: An array of structures that define how much launch traffic to allocate to each launch group during this step of the launch.

evidently.launch.stepconfig.StartTime.Docs: The date and time to start this step of the launch. Use UTC format, `yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ`. For example, `2025-11-25T23:59:59Z`
